lifebench.description: Long-horizon multi-source personalized memory benchmark across 10 users.

locomo.description: Multi-session long-term conversations with 1,986 QA pairs.

longmemeval.description: Long-term memory evaluation in LLM-based chat assistants.

personamem.description: Long-horizon personal preference tracking across conversation sessions.

ama-bench.description: Agent trajectory memory benchmark across Text-to-SQL, Web, Gaming, Embodied AI, SE, and Tool QA domains.

memsim.description: Chinese daily-life memory simulation with diverse QA types across 6 question categories.

membench.description: Agent memory benchmark at different abstraction levels and first/third-person perspectives.

bm25.description: Keyword search baseline. No embeddings — splits docs into chunks and uses BM25 ranking.

cognee.description: Graph-based knowledge extraction with FastEmbed (BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5) + OpenAI LLM.

local.description: Embedded Hindsight fact store using gemini-2.5-flash-lite as the extraction model. Recall uses all memory types (world + experience + observation) with no type filter applied.

cloud.description: Hindsight hosted cloud API. Recall uses all memory types (world + experience + observation) with no type filter applied.

http.description: Hindsight via a self-hosted HTTP endpoint. Recall uses all memory types (world + experience + observation) with no type filter applied.

mastra.description: Mastra semantic recall with LibSQL store and FastEmbed embeddings. topK=10.

mastra-om.description: Mastra Observational Memory: observer/reflector pattern with Gemini 2.5 Flash + GPT-4o.

local.description: Agentic memory with Gemini 2.0 Flash for reflective extraction + local Qdrant store.

cloud.description: Mem0 cloud API. Async indexing — waits for indexing to complete before eval. k=20.

qdrant.description: Hybrid dense + sparse vector search via Qdrant with RRF fusion. Dense: Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B (1024d, asymmetric query/doc encoding). Sparse: BM42 (bm42-all-minilm-l6-v2-attentions). Documents chunked into 512-token windows before indexing. Retrieves top-k=50 chunks (prefetch 100 per branch).

supermemory.description: Supermemory cloud API with temporal metadata support.

rag.description: Default. Provider retrieves top-k documents; they are injected into an LLM prompt as context. Supports both MCQ and open-ended questions.

agentic-rag.description: The LLM acts as an agent with a recall tool and can make multiple retrieval calls with different queries before finalising its answer.

agent.description: Bypasses the benchmark retrieval pipeline entirely — calls the provider's own native direct_answer() for providers that have built-in agentic answering.
